title: LongDS-Bench: On the Failure of Long-Horizon Agentic Data Analysis
note: Zhejiang University + Ant Group Joint Lab of Knowledge Graph. Benchmark of 68 real-world data-analysis tasks (2,225 turns) from Kaggle. Cited in §1–4 for accuracy figures (48.45% top model, 47pp late-turn drop), error taxonomy, and step-count paradox.
